topillum-avg.note: PGDA and ShadowCam measure different physics; pixel-level correlation is not the right validation. This score reports what fraction of ShadowCam's deepest-observed-shadow pixels (bottom 25% of secondary radiance) sit inside PGDA-predicted PSRs (<0.5% direct illumination). Both instruments converge on the same deep-shadow regions.
